name: Medibio Limited
description: Medibio Limited, now known as TrivarX Limited, is an Australia-based health technology company focused on the development of objective measures to assist in the early detection and screening of mental health conditions. The company utilizes proprietary technology to analyze physiological data, aiming to provide clinicians with actionable insights for improved patient outcomes. By pioneering evidence-based diagnostic tools, Medibio seeks to transform the management of mental health disorders, moving away from purely subjective assessments toward more precise, data-driven clinical decision-making processes within the global healthcare market.
